name: ChatVLSC Cloudflare Access MCP Plan
required_permissions: Workers Scripts Edit for production deploy
Secrets Store write permission for central secret catalog when available

service_token.name: chatvlsc-mcp-automation
service_token.storage_policy: Store service-token credentials only in approved client secret stores, Cloudflare Secrets Store when authorized, or local ignored env files for development. Never write them to GitHub, Notion, Linear, MCP metadata, or browser-delivered JavaScript.
service_token.rotation_policy: Rotate immediately if copied into chat, logs, source, Notion, Linear, GitHub, or screenshots.

access_applications.name: ChatVLSC Current MCP Service Auth
access_applications.purpose: Protect the current ChatVLSC user-role MCP JSON-RPC endpoint for machine clients.

policy.name: ChatVLSC Current MCP Service Token
policy.include: approved Cloudflare Access service token only

access_applications.name: RLI Assistant MCP Service Auth
access_applications.purpose: Protect the RLI Assistant MCP JSON-RPC endpoint for machine clients.

policy.name: RLI Assistant MCP Service Token
policy.include: approved Cloudflare Access service token only

access_applications.name: ChatVLSC Admin API Service Auth
access_applications.purpose: Protect administrative Worker endpoints before any admin or Graph actions are exposed.

policy.name: ChatVLSC Admin API Service Token
policy.include: approved Cloudflare Access service token only

identity_provider_plan.interactive_sso: Use Entra ID / Azure AD as the owner/admin identity provider after Graph permissions are available.
identity_provider_plan.oauth_oidc: Keep OAuth/OIDC callback metadata in config/entra-user-role-mcp.graph.json and apply through Microsoft Graph only with Application.ReadWrite.All or equivalent role.
identity_provider_plan.saml: Do not configure SAML for ChatVLSC MCP unless a specific SaaS client requires SAML; prefer OIDC for Entra-backed app registration.
identity_provider_plan.scim: SCIM remains documentation/planning only until Entra and Cloudflare Access identity-provider administration permissions are available.

safe_executor.remote_token_source_policy: Remote Cloudflare reads and writes prefer env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN. Zip-token input is explicit-only via -KeysZip and -CloudflareTokenEntry and must never be committed, printed, or mirrored.
mutation_requires: Cloudflare API token with Access apps/policies and service-token permissions
safe_executor.secret_output_policy: Never prints Cloudflare token, service token client secret, or API response secrets.

next_steps: Run pnpm run test:access-plan in validate-only mode to verify the plan shape without token reads or remote writes.
Use env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN with Access apps/policies and service-token permissions to check remote Access state.
Create or select the Cloudflare Access service token in Cloudflare Zero Trust and store its credentials only in an approved secret store.
Apply the Access applications and Service Auth policies with -Apply after owner approval.
Retest production MCP JSON-RPC endpoints with CF-Access-Client-Id and CF-Access-Client-Secret headers.
